landing.hero.subtext: A modern platform for any portfolio size. Fast to adopt, economical to run, and ready to connect with the tools you already use.
landing.features.label: Platform Capabilities
landing.feature.portfolio.title: Full Portfolio Management
landing.feature.portfolio.desc: Track properties, units, leases, and maintenance from one unified place.
landing.feature.analytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
landing.feature.analytics.desc: Financial dashboards, occupancy rates, and revenue forecasting.
landing.feature.portals.title: Tenant & Owner Portals
landing.feature.portals.desc: Self-service tools for tenants, transparent reporting for owners.
landing.feature.security.title: Enterprise Security
landing.feature.security.desc: Role-based access control, audit logs, and encrypted storage.
landing.footer.wordmark: Built in Naples, Florida · U.S. team
landing.home.hero.title1: You, your team, and tenants in one simple hub.
landing.home.hero.title2: The easy way for everyone to stay in sync.
landing.home.hero.sub: Owners, managers, and tenants share one place for messages, rent, and repairs. No jumping between apps.
landing.home.trust.label: At a glance
landing.home.capabilities.title: Everything your portfolio runs on—messaging to screening
landing.home.capabilities.lead: AI-assisted messaging, direct threads with tenants, maintenance requests, owner-side calendar blocking, online applications, identity verification, automated screening workflows, and income and credit signals—plus rent tracking, accounting-friendly exports, tax-time reporting, and alerts—so your team stops juggling a dozen different tools.
landing.home.capabilities.disclaimer: Tenant screening, credit, and identity capabilities depend on your region, policies, and which integrations you enable. We help you connect the workflows; your screening providers remain responsible for compliance.
landing.home.capabilities.items.aiMessag: Draft clearer replies faster, summarize long threads, and keep tone consistent—without replacing your judgment on what gets sent.
landing.home.capabilities.items.directMe: Staff, owners, and tenants message in one system with history you can search instead of lost text chains.
landing.home.capabilities.items.maintena: Tenants submit issues with context and photos; your team tracks status from new to resolved in one queue.
landing.home.capabilities.items.calendar: Block dates for owner use, maintenance, or holds—so availability and pricing stay aligned across units and seasons.
landing.home.capabilities.items.applicat: Collect applications online with the fields and attachments you require, ready for review and next steps.
landing.home.capabilities.items.verifica: Confirm applicants with document checks and verification steps before you move them forward in your pipeline.
landing.home.capabilities.items.screenin: Run screening as part of the application flow so decisions are faster and auditable—where your integrations and law allow.
landing.home.capabilities.items.incomeFi: Bring employment and credit insights into context with the rest of the file so qualified placements are easier to defend.
landing.home.capabilities.items.rentPaym: See balances, reminders, and payment activity next to the lease instead of reconciling spreadsheets after the fact.
landing.home.capabilities.items.accounti: Roll up rent, fees, and property-level activity into views and exports your accountant can use—plus clearer year-end summaries when tax season hits. Connect QuickBooks or similar where you enable integrations.
landing.home.capabilities.items.leasesDo: Store agreements, addenda, and disclosures where your team already works—less email attachment roulette.
landing.home.capabilities.items.alerts.d: Get nudges for new messages, maintenance updates, applications, and key dates so nothing slips through when you are in the field.
landing.home.diff.title: Fair pricing—and we keep pace with you
landing.home.diff.line.1: We stay deliberately lean: automation handles repetitive work, and a focused team carries the rest—so your subscription pays for software and support you use, not enterprise overhead you never see.
landing.home.diff.line.2: You talk to people who can decide. Fewer handoffs between you and a fix, a setting change, or a straight answer—so most requests move in days, not through layers of account managers.
landing.home.diff.line.3: Rollouts happen in steps you can absorb: core workflows first, then integrations—so your staff is productive early instead of waiting on one big cutover.
landing.home.diff.line.4: We sit beside what you already run—CRM, accounting, older PM tools, and files—with APIs and guided imports, not a forced rip-and-replace.
landing.home.diff.line.5: As you add doors or users, pricing stays proportional and predictable—room to grow without surprise fees for basics at every renewal.
landing.home.why.title: Why teams switch
landing.home.why.lead: Many older tools cost too much per month and still slow people down every day.
landing.home.why.pain.1: Heavy software, slow updates, stiff workflows.
landing.home.why.pain.2: Screens that feel old, especially on phones.
landing.home.why.pain.3: Data split across spreadsheets, email, and double entry.
landing.home.why.pain.4: Add-ons and tiers that push the real bill up.
landing.home.why.pain.5: Onboarding that drags on for months.
landing.home.why.pain.6: Integration work that waits on the vendor.
landing.home.why.pain.7: Harder to scale work without hiring more people.
landing.home.why.answer.1: A lighter product: quick UI, smart defaults, phone friendly flows.
landing.home.why.answer.2: Steady updates. Your feedback shows up in the product.
landing.home.why.answer.3: APIs and imports so less copy and paste.
landing.home.why.answer.4: Simple pricing tied to portfolio size.
landing.home.why.answer.5: Onboarding and migration with clear steps and real humans.
landing.home.why.answer.6: Grow from a small team to a large portfolio without changing software again.
landing.home.pricing.title: Straightforward pricing
landing.home.pricing.subtitle: One clear structure that grows with your portfolio. Ask us about volume pricing.
landing.home.pricing.smartstart.name: SmartStart PM
landing.home.pricing.smartstart.tagline: Per property per month. No minimum. Scales as you grow.
landing.home.pricing.smartstart.note: No minimum. Volume discounts for larger portfolios.
landing.home.pricing.smartstart.transpar: No hidden costs. We are a small team with low overhead, so we do not bury extra fees in the fine print.
landing.home.pricing.smartstart.bullet.1: No monthly floor. Start at your current size.
landing.home.pricing.smartstart.bullet.2: Better per door rates as you add units.
landing.home.pricing.smartstart.bullet.3: Custom setup and integrations without endless change orders.
landing.home.pricing.smartstart.bullet.4: Help with migration and CSV imports. We say so up front.
landing.home.pricing.visual.label: Rough cost index (example only)
landing.home.pricing.legacy.name: AppFolio · Buildium · RentManager
landing.home.pricing.legacy.tagline: Typical range from major competitors. Pricing varies by add-ons and integrations.
landing.home.pricing.legacy.minimums: $250 to $500+ monthly minimums are standard before add-ons.
landing.home.pricing.legacy.addons: Integrations, custom workflows, API access, and extra seats usually mean significant upcharges.
landing.home.pricing.footnote: The table shows the gap—not a binding quote. Fair pricing follows one conversation about your portfolio, integrations, and where you run the app. Strong encryption, optional SSO, SOC 2–aligned practices, and hosting in your own cloud when custody matters.
landing.home.dormitories.title: Multi-building and dormitory management
landing.home.dormitories.sub: Manage dozens of buildings, shared facilities, and complex resident workflows from a single dashboard.
landing.home.dormitories.item.1: Centralized resident directory across all properties and dorms.
landing.home.dormitories.item.2: Facility booking and shared space scheduling for common areas.
landing.home.dormitories.item.3: Bulk import and mass communications for large cohorts.
landing.home.dormitories.item.4: Sub-metering and allocation of shared utility costs.
landing.home.dormitories.item.5: Academic calendar integration and seasonal occupancy planning.
landing.home.whitelabel.title: White-label property management platform
landing.home.whitelabel.sub: Resell SmartStart as your own brand. Agencies, real estate groups, and software platforms use our API to offer PM directly to their clients.
landing.home.whitelabel.item.1: Your logo, domain, and branding throughout the platform.
landing.home.whitelabel.item.2: Custom integrations with your existing workflows and CRM.
landing.home.whitelabel.item.3: Multi-tenant support so you manage clients and their portfolios.
landing.home.whitelabel.item.4: Revenue sharing or licensing models—work with us on terms that fit.
landing.home.whitelabel.item.5: Dedicated technical support and API documentation for your team.
landing.home.connect.title: Works with what you already use
landing.home.connect.sub: Hook up your CRM, QuickBooks, older PM software, or custom systems. Bring data over in stages instead of a risky day one cutover.
landing.home.connect.footer: We connect first, migrate in steps, and keep staff and residents from unnecessary disruption. You can run in your own cloud if you want.
landing.home.roles.title: Who it serves
landing.home.roles.sub: Each role sees what matters. Less back and forth.
landing.home.roles.pm.title: Property managers
landing.home.roles.pm.desc: Units, work orders, messages, and rent in one place. Fewer tabs and spreadsheets.
landing.home.roles.owner.title: Owners and leadership
landing.home.roles.owner.desc: See the portfolio without waiting on hand built reports. Cost scales with unit count.
landing.home.roles.admin.title: Super admins
landing.home.roles.admin.desc: Roles, audit friendly controls, and integrations that fit your rules.
landing.home.roles.staff.title: Staff
landing.home.roles.staff.desc: Simple tasks, phone friendly updates, less typing the same data twice.
landing.home.roles.tenant.title: Tenants
landing.home.roles.tenant.desc: Pay rent, request repairs, and message the office from one clear place.
landing.home.roles.vendor.title: Vendors & maintenance partners
landing.home.roles.vendor.desc: Scoped access to assigned work orders, photos, and status—without seeing your full rent roll or resident PII.
landing.home.ai.title: AI where it actually helps
landing.home.ai.lead: No hype. Automation and suggestions for boring work, faster replies, and cleaner data when you move systems.
landing.home.ai.b1: Less manual cleanup during onboarding and imports.
landing.home.ai.b2: Suggested next steps instead of only static charts.
landing.home.ai.b3: Draft messages your team can edit and send.
landing.home.ai.b4: Sort messy CSV and old exports before go live.
landing.home.ai.b5: Faster sorting of maintenance and resident questions.
landing.home.ai.b6: Handle more volume without adding people in a straight line.
landing.home.ai.panel.title: Move off your current app or spreadsheets without losing track.
landing.home.ai.panel.m1: Step by step moves from common PM platforms.
landing.home.ai.panel.m2: CSV import with help mapping fields and spotting problems.
landing.home.ai.panel.m3: Assisted cleanup and checks. Your team approves what ships.
landing.home.migrate.title: Onboarding that fits real life
landing.home.migrate.sub: You have live leases, partial files, and daily work. We plan in phases instead of one risky flip.
landing.home.migrate.i1: Help moving from common legacy PM tools.
landing.home.migrate.i2: CSV import with templates and checks.
landing.home.migrate.i3: APIs and webhooks for CRM, accounting, and custom systems.
landing.home.migrate.i4: Run in parallel for a while when that makes sense.
landing.home.migrate.i5: Onboarding with clear milestones you can follow.
landing.home.migrate.i6: Live value in weeks when your data is ready, not only in quarters.
landing.home.cta.title: One platform. Every conversation.
landing.home.cta.sub: Managers, owners, and tenants on one system. Messages, rent, and maintenance without a pile of apps or lost threads.

rentals.noResults.subtitle: Try adjusting your filters or search terms
